29:1:1.m: These letters begin this chapter and are pronounced as their full names: Alif, Lam, Meem

29:2:2.m: the people (as the doers in أَحَسِبَ ٱلنَّاسُ - Do the people think)

29:3:6.m: and surely He will know (subject is اللَّهُ)

29:3:9.m: they told the truth (subject of فَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ)

29:3:10.m: and he will definitely know (Allah will know those who are truthful)

29:3:11.m: the liars (object of يَعْلَمَنَّ - He will surely know)

ينَ: (object of يَعْلَمَنَّ - He will surely know)

29:4:4.m: they do/work (referring to those who do evil deeds in this verse)

29:4:5.m: the evil deeds (object of يَعْمَلُونَ/they do)

29:4:6.m: that (connects to يَسْبِقُونَا - they will escape us)

29:4:10.m: they judge (referring to those who do evil deeds in this ayah)

29:6:4.m: he strives hard (subject of the sentence)

29:6:5.m: for his own self (object of يُجٰهِدُ)

29:6:7.m: Allah (as the object being described as غَنِىٌّ/self-sufficient)

َ: (as the object being described as غَنِىٌّ/self-sufficient)

29:7:6.m: from them (relates to لَنُكَفِّرَنَّ - we will surely remove)

29:7:8.m: and We will surely reward them

29:7:9.m: he did excellently/best (describing what they were doing in يَعْمَلُونَ)

29:8:2.m: the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we advised)

29:8:3.m: with/to his two parents (acted on by وَصَّيْنَا)

29:8:6.m: they both strove intensely against you

29:8:18.m: then I will inform you all

29:9:2.m: they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)

29:9:3.m: and they did righteous deeds (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟)

29:9:5.m: we will surely cause them to enter

29:10:2.m: the people (object of كَعَذَابِ - like the punishment of)

29:10:27.m: with more knowledge (of what's in the hearts of all beings)

29:11:1.m: and he will definitely know (connected to ٱللَّهُ as its subject)

29:11:3.m: those who (referring to the believers in ءَامَنُوا۟)

29:11:5.m: and surely he will definitely know (subject: اللَّهُ)

29:13:1.m: and surely he will carry/bear (their burdens)

29:13:6.m: and he will most certainly be asked

29:14:3.m: Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)

ًا: (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)

29:14:12.m: a year (object of فَلَبِثَ - he remained)

29:14:14.m: the flood (that overwhelmed the people of نُوحًا)

29:15:5.m: a sign, miracle (object of جَعَلْنٰهَا - we made it)

29:16:5.m: worship! (command to all of you) (followed by اللَّهَ - Allah)

29:16:7.m: and all of you fear/be mindful of Him

ٱتَّقُو: all of you fear/be mindful of

29:17:6.m: idols (as the things being worshipped in تَعْبُدُونَ)

ًا: (as the things being worshipped in تَعْبُدُونَ)

29:17:8.m: a falsehood (object of تَخْلُقُونَ - you fabricate)

29:17:18.m: sustenance, provision (object of يَمْلِكُونَ - they possess)

29:17:19.m: so you all strive to seek (the sustenance from اللَّهِ)

29:17:21.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)

29:17:22.m: the provision/sustenance (object of يَمْلِكُونَ - they possess)

29:17:24.m: and thank! (command to all of you)

29:17:25.m: for him (connected to تُرْجَعُونَ - you will be returned)

29:18:7.m: before you all (nations mentioned in أُمَمٌ)

29:18:12.m: the clear message (that must be conveyed)

29:18:13.m: the clear one (describing الْبَلٰغُ - the message)

29:19:6.m: the creation (object of يُبْدِئُ - he begins)

29:19:7.m: then (connects 'Do they not see?' with what follows)

29:19:10.m: that (in this ayah, refers to the resurrection/bringing back to life mentioned before)

كَ: the resurrection/bringing back to life mentioned before

29:20:12.m: the creation (object of يُنشِئُ - He creates)

29:21:3.m: he wants/wishes (subject of يُعَذِّبُ - he punishes)

29:21:4.m: and he shows mercy (paired with يُعَذِّبُ - he punishes)

29:21:7.m: and to him (connected to تُقْلَبُونَ - you will be returned)

29:21:8.m: you all are being turned over (back to اللَّهِ)

29:22:3.m: by/with those who make others powerless

29:22:15.m: any strong protector (in context: besides Allah)

29:22:17.m: any helper/supporter (in relation to مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ - besides Allah)

29:23:7.m: they lost hope (referring to those who disbelieved/كَفَرُوا)

29:23:10.m: and those (referring to those who disbelieved)

29:23:11.m: for them (referring to those who disbelieved)

29:24:7.m: they said (the response of his people)

29:24:12.m: Allah (as the doer who saved him)

ُ: as the doer who saved him

29:25:12.m: the worldly life (in contrast to the afterlife)

دُّنْيَا: worldly life (in contrast to the afterlife)

29:25:17.m: some of you (subject of يَكْفُرُ - disbelieves)

29:25:19.m: and he curses (connected to يَكْفُرُ - he denies)

29:25:23.m: the fire (subject of مَأْوَىٰكُمُ - your refuge)

29:25:24.m: and not/and there is not (negates يَكْفُرُ and يَلْعَنُ)

29:25:26.m: from/of (connects دُونِ with what comes before it)

29:26:1.m: then he believed (in response to لُوطٌ)

29:27:3.m: Isaac (as the object of وَهَبْنَا/We granted)

29:27:9.m: and the book (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made/placed)

29:27:11.m: his reward (object of ءَاتَيْنٰهُ - we gave)

29:27:18.m: the righteous ones (among whom he will be)

29:28:5.m: indeed you all (speaking to Lot's people)

29:28:6.m: surely you all come (addressing multiple males)

29:28:9.m: he went ahead of you all (addressing قَوْمِهِ his people)

29:28:10.m: with it/her (referring to الْفٰحِشَةَ - the immorality)

29:29:1.m: is it true that you all

29:29:20.m: if (introduces condition for كُنتَ - you were)

29:30:3.m: help me! (command to Allah in رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى)

29:31:11.m: the village (that is being discussed in this story)

29:31:15.m: people who treat others unfairly (describes أَهْلَهَا - its people)

29:32:3.m: in it/her (referring to the city where Lut was)

29:32:4.m: Lot (as the object being talked about)

ًا: as the object being talked about

29:32:5.m: they said (referring to the angels speaking to Ibrahim about Lut)

29:32:6.m: we (as the subject of أَعْلَمُ - we know)

29:32:11.m: and his family (who will be saved)

29:32:16.m: the ones who remain behind (after مِنَ)

29:33:3.m: she came (subject of سِىٓءَ - was troubled)

ًا: (as the object of رُسُلُنَا/our messengers came to)

29:33:18.m: and your family (being acted upon by مُنَجُّوكَ)

29:33:19.m: except (excluding امْرَأَتَكَ/your wife from being saved)

29:33:20.m: your wife (object of مُنَجُّوكَ - we will save)

29:33:22.m: from (of الْغٰبِرِينَ - those who remained behind)

29:33:23.m: the ones who stay behind (those who remain after others leave)

29:34:2.m: ones who are sending down (subject of إِنَّا)

29:34:5.m: this (feminine, near) (pointing to ٱلْقَرْيَةِ - the town)

29:35:4.m: a sign/miracle (object of تَّرَكْنَا - we left)

29:35:5.m: a clear sign/evidence (object of تَرَكْنَا - we left)

ًا: as the object being sent to Madyan

29:36:8.m: Allah (as the object of اعْبُدُوا - worship)

29:36:13.m: you all act wickedly (in a corrupting way)

29:37:4.m: so they became/entered into a state

29:37:7.m: ones who are lying flat/crouching motionless (acted upon by أَصْبَحُوا)

29:39:7.m: with the clear proofs/evidences (object of جَآءَهُم)

29:40:17.m: the earth (object being swallowed in خَسَفْنَا)

29:40:24.m: that He wrong them (connected to وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ - and Allah was not)

29:41:9.m: the spider (possessed by/connected to something else)

29:41:13.m: weakest (describing بَيْتُ ٱلْعَنكَبُوتِ - house of the spider)

29:41:18.m: they were (subject of يَعْلَمُونَ - they know)

29:42:9.m: a thing (that they call upon besides Allah)

29:45:21.m: you all make/create (in the ayah: what you all do/make)

29:53:1.m: and they seek to rush you
